publishedAbstract: Both MDSs enter an Error/CrashLoopBackOff state due to a failed `rook-ceph-mgr-a` delete operation. Most likely due to a database workload. ~~~ NAME READY STATUS RESTARTS AGE rook-ceph-mds-ocs-storagecluster-cephfilesystem-a-9b68f854zbw9z 1/2 Running 5 5m30s rook-ceph-mds-ocs-storagecluster-cephfilesystem-b-c7c87476b7gq6 1/2 Running 5 5m30s name: mds ready: false restartCount: 4 started: false state: waiting: message: back-off 1m20s restarting failed container=mds pod=rook-ceph-mds-ocs-storagecluster-cephfilesystem-a-9b68f854zbw9z_openshift-storage(10c20d44-014b-4b62-b9e2-83df4a6d2177) reason: CrashLoopBackOff ~~~
publishedTitle: CephFS MDSs are in CLBO due to rook-ceph-mgr-a being Unable to Perform Delete Ops - OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)
